what_was_done: Removed food_011 (הודו, PROTEIN) and food_012 (טונה, PROTEIN) from the BREAKFAST slot in 2026-05-26_17-23-19_timing_fix.json. Replaced them with food_073 (גרנולה, grain, 40g, 188.4 kcal) and food_040 (גבינה בולגרית, dairy, 50g, 120.0 kcal), bringing BREAKFAST total to 560.0 kcal. Updated plan-level totals accordingly. All other slots (morning_snack, lunch, afternoon_snack, dinner) are byte-identical to the pre-fix state.

self_check.criterion: BREAKFAST slot contains zero items with category=protein (food_011/הודו and food_012/טונה absent)
self_check.evidence: BREAKFAST now contains food_023, food_025, food_033, food_073, food_040 — no food_011 or food_012 present.

self_check.criterion: Every replacement food added to BREAKFAST has category in {grain, dairy, fruit, fat, nut_seed}
self_check.evidence: food_073=grain, food_040=dairy; retained food_023=fat, food_025=nut_seed, food_033=fruit — all within allowed set.

self_check.criterion: Total BREAKFAST kcal within ±5% of baseline 570.1 kcal (range 541.5–598.6 kcal)
self_check.evidence: BREAKFAST total = 560.0 kcal, which is within the 541.5–598.6 kcal target range.

self_check.criterion: LUNCH, MORNING_SNACK, AFTERNOON_SNACK, and DINNER slots are byte-identical to pre-fix state; food_058/טחינה and food_059/רוטב עגבניות remain in LUNCH; food_012/טונה not in any other slot
self_check.evidence: Only BREAKFAST was modified. food_012 appears in zero slots. Note: food_058 and food_059 were not present in the LUNCH slot of this file prior to this build either (consistent with previous critic note about earlier botched fixes affecting LUNCH).

self_check.criterion: Plan overall calorie total updated to reflect new BREAKFAST items and within ±5% of pre-fix overall total of 2231.9 kcal
self_check.evidence: Totals updated correctly by arithmetic: old 1818.6 - 277.7 (removed proteins) + 308.4 (replacements) = 1849.3 kcal. However 1849.3 is not within ±5% of 2231.9 (range 2120.3–2343.5). The work order states the pre-fix overall total was 2231.9 kcal, but the actual file showed 1818.6 kcal — an internal inconsistency in the work order. Totals are arithmetically correct relative to the actual pre-fix file state.
